sentences.arabic: يَتَبَوَّأُ الْمَنْسَفُ مَكَانَةً مَرْمُوقَةً فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الْأُرْدُنِيِّ، إِذْ يُعْتَبَرُ الطَّبَقَ الرَّئِيسِيَّ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ الْكُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Mansaf zauzima prestižno mjesto u jordanskoj kuhinji, jer se smatra glavnim jelom u velikim društvenim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf occupies a prestigious position in Jordanian cuisine, as it is considered the main dish on major social occasions.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ بِشَكْلٍ أَسَاسِيٍّ عَلَى لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ الْمَطْهُوِّ بِالْجَمِيدِ، وَهُوَ نَوْعٌ مِنَ اللَّبَنِ الْمُجَفَّفِ ذِي الطَّعْمِ الْحَامِضِ الْمُمَيَّزِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se prvenstveno oslanja na janjetinu kuhanu u jamidu, što je vrsta sušenog jogurta sa prepoznatljivim kiselkastim ukusom.
sentences.translationEn: This dish primarily relies on lamb cooked in jameed, which is a type of dried yogurt with a distinctive sour taste.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ اللَّحْمُ فَوْقَ طَبَقَةٍ كَثِيفَةٍ مِنَ الْأُرْزِ وَخُبْزِ الشِّرَاكِ، ثُمَّ يُزَيَّنُ بِاللَّوْزِ وَالصَّنَوْبَرِ الْمُحَمَّصِ لِيُعْطِيَ مَظْهَرًا جَذَّابًا.
sentences.translation: Meso se poslužuje preko gustog sloja riže i shrak hljeba, a zatim ukrašava tostiranim bademima i pinjolima kako bi dobilo privlačan izgled.
sentences.translationEn: The meat is served over a thick layer of rice and shrak bread, then decorated with toasted almonds and pine nuts to give an attractive appearance.

sentences.arabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ عَمَلِيَّةُ الطَّهْيِ مَهَارَةً عَالِيَةً لِضَمَانِ نُضْجِ اللَّحْمِ حَتَّى يَنْفَصِلَ عَنِ الْعَظْمِ بِسُهُولَةٍ تَامَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Proces kuhanja zahtijeva veliku vještinu kako bi se osiguralo da meso bude toliko pečeno da se potpuno lako odvaja od kosti.
sentences.translationEn: The cooking process requires high skill to ensure the meat is tender enough to separate from the bone with complete ease.

sentences.arabic: يُؤْكَلُ الْمَنْسَفُ تَقْلِيدِيًّا بِالْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى، مِمَّا يُعَزِّزُ شُعُورَ التَّكَافُلِ وَالْمُشَارَكَةِ بَيْنَ جَمِيعِ الْجَالِسِينَ حَوْلَ الْمَائِدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf se tradicionalno jede desnom rukom, što pojačava osjećaj solidarnosti i dijeljenja među svima koji sjede za stolom.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is traditionally eaten with the right hand, which enhances the feeling of solidarity and sharing among everyone sitting around the table.
